2603.21475.title: Unified-MAS: Universally Generating Domain-Specific Nodes for Empowering Automatic Multi-Agent Systems
2603.21475.paper_summary: Automatic Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) generation has emerged as a promising paradigm for solving complex reasoning tasks. However, existing frameworks are fundamentally bottlenecked when applied to knowledge-intensive domains (e.g., healthcare and law). They either rely on a static library of general nodes like Chain-of-Thought, which lack specialized expertise, or attempt to generate nodes on the fly. In the latter case, the orchestrator is not only bound by its internal knowledge limits but must also simultaneously generate domain-specific logic and optimize high-level topology, leading to a severe architectural coupling that degrades overall system efficacy. To bridge this gap, we propose Unified-MAS that decouples granular node implementation from topological orchestration via offline node synthesis. Unified-MAS operates in two stages: (1) Search-Based Node Generation retrieves external open-world knowledge to synthesize specialized node blueprints, overcoming the internal knowledge limits of LLMs; and (2) Reward-Based Node Optimization utilizes a perplexity-guided reward to iteratively enhance the internal logic of bottleneck nodes. Extensive experiments across four specialized domains demonstrate that integrating Unified-MAS into four Automatic-MAS baselines yields a better performance-cost trade-off, achieving up to a 14.2% gain while significantly reducing costs. Further analysis reveals its robustness across different designer LLMs and its effectiveness on conventional tasks such as mathematical reasoning.
2603.21475.paper_summary_zh: 自動多代理系統（MAS）生成已成為解決複雜推理任務的有前景範式。<lb/>然而，現有框架在應用於知識密集型領域（例如醫療保健和法律）時，基本上受到瓶頸限制。<lb/>它們要麼依賴於靜態的通用節點庫，如Chain-of-Thought，這些節點缺乏專業知識，要麼試圖即時生成節點。<lb/>在後一種情況下，協調者不僅受到其內部知識限制的約束，還必須同時生成特定領域的邏輯並優化高層拓撲，導致嚴重的架構耦合，降低整體系統的效能。<lb/>為了彌補這一差距，我們提出了Unified-MAS，通過離線節點合成將細粒度節點實現與拓撲協調解耦。<lb/>Unified-MAS運作分為兩個階段：（1）基於搜索的節點生成檢索外部開放世界知識，以合成專業節點藍圖，克服LLMs的內部知識限制；（2）基於獎勵的節點優化利用困惑度引導的獎勵，迭代增強瓶頸節點的內部邏輯。<lb/>在四個專業領域的大量實驗表明，將Unified-MAS整合到四個自動MAS基準中能夠實現更好的性能成本權衡，達到高達14.2%的增益，同時顯著降低成本。<lb/>進一步分析顯示其在不同設計者LLMs中的穩健性及其在數學推理等傳統任務上的有效性。
2603.21475.author: Hehai Lin et.al.
2603.21475.authors: Hehai Lin, Yu Yan, Zixuan Wang, Bo Xu, Sudong Wang, Weiquan Huang, Ruochen Zhao, Minzhi Li, Chengwei Qin
